name: Zotero Direct

releases.author: Wenzhi-Ding
releases.description:
# Zotero Direct v0.10.0

This is the first release of **Zotero Direct**, a personalized fork of [stefanopagliari/bibnotes](https://github.com/stefanopagliari/bibnotes).

## Highlights

### 🔌 Direct Zotero Database Access
- Reads the Zotero SQLite database directly — no need to export JSON files or install any Zotero plugins.
- Built-in SQL.js (WebAssembly) for in-browser SQLite parsing.
- Intelligent caching to avoid re-reading unchanged data.

### ✂️ Simplified & Focused
- Removed complex highlight/annotation/image import features (~6,000 lines of code removed).
- Only imports **metadata** (title, author, abstract, etc.), keeping notes clean and manageable.
- Greatly reduced configuration options — get started in seconds.

### 🧠 Human in the Loop
- Encourages active reading and manual note-taking rather than auto-importing all annotations.
- Literature notes serve as a starting point for your own thinking, not a dump of highlights.

### 🌐 i18n Support
- Full bilingual support: English & 简体中文.
- Documentation available in both languages.

### 🛠️ Code Modernization
- Restructured source code into modular files (`zotero-db.ts`, `zotero-cache.ts`, `modal.ts`, `utils.ts`, etc.).
- Migrated to modern ESLint flat config (`eslint.config.mts`).
- Updated dependencies and build tooling.

## Installation

Install directly from **Obsidian Community Plugins**: search for “Zotero Direct”.

Or download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`, and `sql-wasm.js` from this release and place them in your vault’s `.obsidian/plugins/zotero-direct/` directory.

## Full Changelog

https://github.com/Wenzhi-Ding/zotero-direct/commits/0.10.0
